properties.name: mill.ai.chat.scenario-capture.enabled
properties.description: When true, persist extended run events (tool.call, tool.result) and expose GET /api/v1/ai/chats/{chatId}/scenario-export for dev/tuning. Default false.

properties.name: mill.ai.chat.max-iterations
properties.description: Maximum native tool-loop iterations per agent turn before returning the iteration-limit fallback.
